T0048.title: Card Bust-Out
T0048.definition: A form of credit card fraud involving maxing out a credit line and evading repayment obligations, causing losses to banks and financial institutions. This behavior commonly occurs in scenarios such as large purchases, cash withdrawals, installment plans, cyclic cash-outs, and applications using fake identities. The objectives are illegal profit, debt concealment, debt evasion, or supporting other illicit activities.

T0048.usageExample: 那批料申下来的卡全做空卡处理，刷完就扔，不用考虑还。
